hooks.command: python3 -c 'import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); sys.exit(0 if "git push" in d.get("tool_input",{}).get("command","") else 1)' || exit 0; SHA=$(git rev-parse HEAD); WAITED=0; while true; do RUN_ID=$(gh run list --repo apelullo/paprika-agent --commit $SHA --limit 1 --json databaseId --jq '.[0].databaseId'); [ -n "$RUN_ID" ] && [ "$RUN_ID" != "null" ] && break; sleep 3; WAITED=$((WAITED+3)); [ $WAITED -ge 30 ] && exit 0; done; WAITED=0; while [ "$(gh run view $RUN_ID --repo apelullo/paprika-agent --json status --jq '.status')" != "completed" ] && [ $WAITED -lt 120 ]; do sleep 5; WAITED=$((WAITED+5)); done; gh run view $RUN_ID --repo apelullo/paprika-agent | python3 -c 'import json,sys; print(json.dumps({"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "PostToolUse", "additionalContext": sys.stdin.read()}}))'
